audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds because next_fork_version is computed via forkVersionAtEpoch(nextForkEpochAtEpoch(epoch)). Since consensusForkAtEpoch ignores BLOB_SCHEDULE and only checks major fork epochs (L1144-1151), BPO fork epochs return the same consensus fork as the current epoch, thus preserving next_fork_version while updating next_fork_epoch.
